description: Partially update an existing entry. Only provided fields are modified. Changing body or kind recomputes content_hash and checks for duplicates. Scope migration is excluded; use cx_store with supersedes to move entries across scopes. At least one field must be provided.

body.description: New body content in markdown. Changing body recomputes content_hash and checks for duplicates. Omit to keep existing.

id.description: ID of the entry to update.

kind.description: New kind classification. Changing kind recomputes content_hash. Omit to keep existing.

meta.description: Replace metadata entirely. Provide the complete desired meta object with fields: tags (array), confidence (high/medium/low), source (string), expires_at (ISO 8601), priority (integer). Omit to keep existing metadata.

title.description: New title. Omit to keep existing.

name: cx_update

outputSchema.description: Update receipt: updated entry id and new content hash.

content_hash.description: Full BLAKE3 content hash after update.
